other_observers: Brandon Percival and Mark Peterson; Brian Gibbons found it, Bill Maynard should have but he went home early, he had to rub his bunyons.
description: A dark long thin-winged nightjar with a long tail. The tail had prominent white tips to the outermost feathers. The bird was completely dark chocolate brown. It had a tiny bill.Behaviors: Flushed from the exact smae spot two times. Each time it flew up to a tree limb which allowed for good to excellent looksCall: nonePlumage: unknown
